infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: MeshSOS uses Bluetooth to connect to your nearby LoRa node for emergency mesh communication.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: MeshSOS uses Bluetooth to connect to your nearby LoRa node for emergency mesh communication.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MeshSOS captures your GPS location to include with supply requests so responders know where you are.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MeshSOS captures your GPS location to include with supply requests so responders know where you are.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow MeshSOS to connect to your LoRa node for emergency communication.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MeshSOS to use your location for supply requests.
